import { Blog } from "../blog/Blog"; import { Month } from "./Months"; import { Year } from "./Year" export const Timeline: React.FC = () => { return (

Blog Timeline

title="Blog Post 1" author="Author 1" date="January 1, 2015" content="Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit."

title="Blog Post 2" author="Author 2" date="January 15, 2015" content="Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua."

title="Blog Post 3" author="Author 3" date="February 5, 2015" content="Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco."

title="Blog Post 4" author="Author 4" date="February 20, 2015" content="Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur."

{/* Add more months for 2015 */} {/* Add more years */}
); }; const sampleData = [ { title: "Learning React Today!", author: "Cin Khai", date: "10-12-2021", content: "Today we will be learning React. I am going to be creating a blog post" }, { title: "Exploring the Mysteries of Deep Space", author: "John Astronomer", date: "2023-08-15", content: "In a groundbreaking discovery, astronomers have uncovered new information about the origins of distant galaxies..." }, { title: "The Art of Gourmet Cooking", author: "Chef Emily Cuisine", date: "2023-09-02", content: "Indulge in the world of culinary delights as we dive into the secrets behind creating exquisite gourmet dishes..." }, { title: "Green Energy Revolution: Solar Power's Rise", author: "Sarah Environmentalist", date: "2023-07-22", content: "As the world shifts towards sustainability, solar power is emerging as a key player in the global quest for clean energy..." } ]
